name: Echo Loop
short_description: Dodge your own ghosts in this minimalist arcade survival. Every 8 seconds, a new echo spawns — replaying your exact movements. Collect orbs, chain combos, unlock skins, and survive as long as you can. Your greatest enemy is yourself.
detailed_description:
Echo Loop is a minimalist 2D arcade survival where your worst enemy is yourself.

You control a glowing sphere in a dark arena. Collect energy orbs to score points and build combos. But every few seconds, a new "echo" materializes — a ghost that endlessly replays your past movements.

The arena fills with more and more echoes of your former self. One touch means damage. Three hits and you're done.

KEY FEATURES

- Unique mechanic: your enemies ARE you — every echo mirrors your past path

- Combo system: chain orb pickups for bonus points

- 12 unlockable skins across 4 rarities (Common, Rare, Epic, Legendary)

- 6 unique arenas with distinct visual themes

- Dash ability with cooldown for clutch escapes

- 4 powerups: Shield, Slow-Mo, Echo Eraser, Magnet

- 13 achievements to hunt

- Daily Challenge mode with bonus coin rewards

- Boss waves every 5 rounds

- Procedural audio — every sound is generated in real-time

- Colorblind mode and accessibility options

- Offline — no internet required

Easy to learn. Impossible to master. Just one more run.
